cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this problem step by step. First, let me understand what the question is asking. So the only time when Andrew is not accounted for is between 5pm and 6pm. Since the clothing store is open until 9pm, and Andrew wasn't at the library yet at 5pm (he starts there at 6pm), he could have gone to the clothing store during this 5pm to 6pm window.
